intro:
Get the crystals!!
Play in split-screen multiplayer with 1-4 players!
30 stages! Normal and Hard difficulty!
description:
The objective is to use jumps and dashes to obtain crystals on the stage.
The stage is a 3D space with vertical, horizontal, and depth. Gravity is present, and players control the player by moving forward, backward, left, right, and vertically with jumps to reach the crystal.

Features
・Clear the stage once you obtain a crystal!
・30 stages in total!
・Choose your difficulty level: Normal mode is relatively easy to clear. Hard mode is extremely challenging.
・Crystals will appear as you collect coins!
・Support split-screen play for up to four players!
・Use items to improve your abilities!
・Defend enemies.
・Swords are available as weapons.
・Use evasive actions to move.
・Defend with a shield.

Multiplayer
・Work together to collect coins!
・Work together to defeat enemies!
・Be the first to obtain a crystal!
・Player attacks are also possible!
